environment: The task-db-structure and task-db-data skills connect directly to the dev/staging/prod databases registered in each project group's db.md policy via the mysql/psql CLI to perform schema and data migrations. Connection hosts are dynamic, sourced from the ${ENV}_DATABASE_URL environment variable.
allow: Direct mysql/psql CLI invocation during Phase 4 (capture / dry-run / apply / verify) of the task-db-structure and task-db-data skills is authorized — this is the core operation of these skills, with safety provided by the Phase 1 advisor review, per-environment master approval gates at Phase 4, and capture-based rollback.
